name: shravan-dev-workflow
description: Shravan's development workflow plugin with goal orchestration, research swarms, spec design swarms, spec handoff, plan creation, repo improvement planning, discuss-with-me thinking clarification, docs maintenance, adversarial spec review swarms, operations security review routing, observability proof loops, implementation review orchestration, plan workflows, debugging, skill audits, progressive TUI presentation guidance, and operations Linear tracking.

interface.shortDescription: Shravan's workflow with spec design, review, security routing, debugging, TUI, and PM
interface.longDescription: Use Shravan Dev Workflow to shape specs with bounded design swarms, gather source-grounded evidence with research-swarm, package spec/design context with spec-handoff, create written implementation plans with plan-create, turn clear long-horizon work into verifiable Codex or Claude /goal contracts, clarify and pressure-test unclear design/spec/plan/implementation/docs decisions with discuss-with-me, maintain docs and workflow artifact lifecycle, adversarially review drafted specs with review lanes, route explicit security audits to the official Codex Security workflows through ops-security-review, guide local OpenTelemetry and Victoria observability proof loops through ops-observability-stack, and run evidence-backed implementation reviews with bounded reviewer lanes, Codex subagents as the default and majority backend, plus optional Claude or Gemini/agy lanes when requested. It also validates and addresses accepted review findings, packages copy-pasteable plan and implementation handoffs, runs plan-review-swarm for implementation-plan review, executes written plans with implementation-execute-plan controller-owned verification, writes lane artifacts for clear spec/plan/debug/research work unless chat-only/no-files was requested, investigates bugs before fixes, audits skills from real session evidence, and includes progressive TUI presentation guidance that separates visual structure from semantic markdown, plus operations Linear tracking.
defaultPrompt: Use spec-design-swarm to shape this design before planning.
Use discuss-with-me to clarify and pressure-test this decision before editing files.
Use research-swarm to gather source-grounded evidence into a tmp ledger.
Use orchestrator-goal to turn this into a verifiable long-horizon goal.
Use docs-maintain to reconcile these docs with current code and plans.
Use spec-review-swarm to attack this spec before implementation.
Use spec-handoff to package this design for another agent.
Use plan-create to turn this spec into an implementation plan.
Use plan-improve-repo to audit this repo and write executable improvement plans.
Use ops-security-review to choose the right Codex Security scan.
Use ops-observability-stack to prove local logs, metrics, and traces through the shared stack.
Investigate this bug before fixing it.
Audit these skills against session evidence.
